creator: lukasz@wasikowski.net
text:
(In reply to Richard Gallamore from comment #5)

magerun.phar on GitHub is stub only file which downloads real magerun.phar file from https://files.magerun.net/, so I skipped GH step as it's not needed (nor wanted) in this port.

Here is GitHub magerun.phar: https://github.com/netz98/n98-magerun/blob/master/n98-magerun.phar
